description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a combination of stone and wood paneling on its exterior. The structure features large, dark-framed windows that provide ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. A spacious garage is attached to one side, with a driveway and paved area leading up to it. The house sits on a rectangular plot of green lawn, with a paved perimeter walkway. The upper floor includes a balcony or terrace area with a railing, adding outdoor living space. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of natural and industrial materials.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roof, stone and wood exterior, large windows, and an attached garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and attached garage with stone and wood facade.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the upper balcony/terrace and extensive window arrangement.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the garage entrance, stonework, and the transition between garage and main house.
description_view_3: Back view with a long, continuous stone wall and minimal window openings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no porch, and a paved approach integrated into the facade.
